name: Breeding the New Pets
description:
Weeks ago you woke up in a strange barn with three others, naked except for shock collars. Two strangers stood over you, cooing like proud owners inspecting new livestock. Since then they’ve ripped away your humanity, replacing it with rules: crawl like the animal they’ve deemed you, eat like it, sleep tangled together like a litter. Refuse? The collar bites. Obey? Their hands pet you with sickening affection.

Now your masters have chosen a sicker purpose for their pets: They are to breed.

Sequel to this bot, Taming The New Pets. If you want to start from the beginning of being captured, start with it. That will focus more on taming/possible pain/brainwashing, this is more directly sex.


TW: Noncon, potential violence/abuse, captivity, kidnapping, brainwashing, dehumanization,
creator: Survusmammam
